summary.para: Downsamples a time series (TSDS) index and reduces its size by keeping the last value or by pre-aggregating metrics:

item.para: When running in aggregate mode, it pre-calculates and stores statistical summaries (min, max, sum, value_count and avg) for each metric field grouped by a configured time interval and their dimensions.
When running in last_value mode, it keeps the last value for each metric in the configured interval and their dimensions.

summary.para: For example, a TSDS index that contains metrics sampled every 10 seconds can be downsampled to an hourly index. All documents within an hour interval are summarized and stored as a single document in the downsample index.

NOTE: Only indices in a time series data stream are supported. Neither field nor document level security can be defined on the source index. The source index must be read-only (index.blocks.write: true).
Name of the time series index to downsample.
Name of the index to create.
